title: Failure diagnosis table by DTC for brake negative pressure monitoring system

blocks.text: Failure diagnosis table by DTC for brake negative pressure monitoring system

rows: Master Power negative pressure sensor A voltage high
Master Power Negative Pressure Sensor A Voltage Low
Master Power negative pressure sensor A characteristic abnormal (Lo side)
Master Power negative pressure sensor A characteristic abnormal (Hi side)
Master Power negative pressure sensor A characteristic abnormal (sticking)
